Interface IFullTextSearchTerm

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Represents the search term unit. Multiple search term units make up a full-text search query.

[Guid("6DCA7D4B-13F9-45C5-A532-8EBC2D6CD022")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFullTextSearchTerm

The field name at the given index.

int

The boolean operator used between terms in a keyword search.

esriFullTextSearchOperator

SearchTerm

The search term.

string SearchTerm { get; set; }

string

SearchType

The search term modifier to apply against the search term.

esriFullTextSearchType SearchType { get; set; }

esriFullTextSearchType

The search where clause.

string SearchWhere { get; set; }
